title: hieracium caucasiense subsp. hypopogon
intro: Hieracium caucasiense subsp. hypopogon is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), characterized by its small yellow flowers and hairy leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Hieracium caucasiense subsp. hypopogon are thought to include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in herbal medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
